targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  pt_1_pressure AS "PT1",
  pt_2_pressure AS "PT2",
  pt3 AS "PT3",
  pt4 AS "PT4"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  load_cell AS "Propellant Mass"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  qd_state AS "QD Step",
  flight_mode AS "Flight Mode",
  ignition AS "Ignition Command"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  rtd AS "RTD Temperature"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  pt_1_pressure AS "PT1",
  pt_2_pressure AS "PT2",
  pt3 AS "PT3",
  pt4 AS "PT4"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  sv_1_open AS "SV1",
  sv_2_open AS "SV2",
  ball_valve_open AS "Ball Valve",
  mav_open AS "MAV"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  temp AS "Altimeter Temp",
  rtd AS "ADC RTD Temp"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  num_satellites AS "Satellites"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  altitude AS "Altitude (m)",
  pressure AS "Pressure (Pa)",
  temp AS "Temp (°C)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  accel_z AS "Z-Axis Accel (m/s²)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) AS "Seconds Since Last Rx"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  latitude,
  longitude
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  altitude AS "Altitude"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  accel_x AS "X-Axis",
  accel_y AS "Y-Axis",
  accel_z AS "Z-Axis"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  gyro_x AS "Roll (X)",
  gyro_y AS "Pitch (Y)",
  gyro_z AS "Yaw (Z)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  altitude AS "Altitude"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  altitude AS "Apogee"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1;

SELECT
  accel_x AS "X-Axis",
  accel_y AS "Y-Axis",
  accel_z AS "Z-Axis"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  gyro_x AS "Roll (X)",
  gyro_y AS "Pitch (Y)",
  gyro_z AS "Yaw (Z)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

WITH raw_data AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    
    (altitude - lag(altitude) OVER (ORDER BY time)) / 
    NULLIF("timestamp" - lag("timestamp") OVER (ORDER BY time), 0) AS raw_baro_vel_z,

    vel_d  
    
  FROM telemetry_data
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(time) AND 
    unit_id = 1
),
smoothed AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY time) AS pkt_num,
    
    AVG(raw_baro_vel_z) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS baro_vel_z,
    vel_d

  FROM raw_data
)
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  
  -- The Barometric derived metrics (Smoothed & Masked for boost phase)
  CASE WHEN pkt_num > 10 THEN baro_vel_z ELSE NULL END AS "Barometric Vertical Velocity",
  
  -vel_d AS "GPS Vertical Velocity"

FROM smoothed
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  ssa_drogue_deployed AS "Drogue",
  ssa_main_deployed AS "Main"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  head_mot / 100000.0 AS "Drift Heading (°)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  g_speed AS "Overall Velocity",
  vel_n AS "Latitudinal Velocity",
  vel_e AS "Longitudinal Velocity"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

WITH raw_data AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    -- Hardware timestamp derivative to avoid network jitter
    (altitude - lag(altitude) OVER (ORDER BY time)) / 
    NULLIF("timestamp" - lag("timestamp") OVER (ORDER BY time), 0) AS raw_vel_z
  FROM telemetry_data
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(time) AND 
    unit_id = 1
),
smoothed AS (
  SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY time) AS pkt_num,
    AVG(raw_vel_z) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS vel_z
  FROM raw_data
)
SELECT
  MAX(vel_z) / 343.0 AS "Max Mach"
FROM smoothed
-- Filter out the first 10 packets so a startup spike doesn't trigger a false max
WHERE pkt_num > 10;

SELECT
  MAX(SQRT(accel_x * accel_x + accel_y * accel_y + accel_z * accel_z)) / 9.81 AS "Max Peak Shock (Gs)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1 AND
  -- Only look at data AFTER the drogue or main has fired
  (ssa_drogue_deployed = 1 OR ssa_main_deployed = 1);

SELECT
  latitude::numeric(10,5) || '°, ' || longitude::numeric(10,5) || '°' AS "Coordinates"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE 
  unit_id = 1 
  AND latitude != 0 
  AND longitude != 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  flight_mode AS "Flight Mode"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) AS "Seconds Since Last Rx"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Time Since Last Fill Station Packet

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) AS "Seconds Since Last Rx"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0,1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 20;
